tasks.title: Project Setup
tasks.description: Integrate Clerk SDK into the existing Spring Boot project and configure credentials.
tasks.details:
- Add Clerk Maven dependency to existing pom.xml
- Add Clerk configuration to application-dev.yml
- Verify the provided Clerk credentials (publishable key, secret key, webhook secret)
- Extend existing error handling framework for Clerk errors
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the application starts successfully without errors and that the Clerk SDK initializes correctly.

tasks.title: Database Schema Migration
tasks.description: Create Liquibase migrations to add new columns to existing tables and create new tables required for Clerk integration.
tasks.details:
- Add new Clerk-related columns to existing user_profile table
- Create new clerk_user_tenant junction table
- Create new clerk_organization_role table
- Create new clerk_webhook_event table
- Create new clerk_session table
- Add indexes and constraints to optimize queries
- Update unique constraint to support multi-tenant (email, tenant_id)
tasks.testStrategy: Ensure migrations run successfully on the existing database, preserve existing user_profile data, and that the application starts without migration errors.

tasks.title: Implement ClerkIntegrationService
tasks.description: Create service layer for interacting with Clerk SDK.
tasks.details:
- Create ClerkIntegrationService interface
- Implement ClerkIntegrationServiceImpl
- Initialize Clerk SDK with credentials
- Implement user management methods (createUser, getUserById, updateUser)
- Implement token validation methods
- Implement organization management methods
- Add comprehensive error handling and logging
tasks.testStrategy: Write unit tests with >80% coverage ensuring the service successfully calls Clerk APIs and handles errors appropriately.

tasks.title: Implement Sign-Up API
tasks.description: Create REST endpoint for user registration with Clerk.
tasks.details:
- Create SignUpRequest and SignUpResponse DTOs
- Implement POST /api/auth/sign-up endpoint
- Validate input parameters
- Call ClerkIntegrationService to create user in Clerk
- Create user_profile record in database
- Generate JWT token
- Handle validation errors
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the endpoint returns 201 on success, creates a user in both Clerk and database, returns a valid JWT token, and properly handles validation errors.

tasks.title: Implement Sign-In API
tasks.description: Create REST endpoint for user authentication with Clerk.
tasks.details:
- Create SignInRequest and SignInResponse DTOs
- Implement POST /api/auth/sign-in endpoint
- Validate credentials with Clerk
- Load user_profile from database
- Generate JWT token
- Update last_sign_in_at timestamp
- Handle invalid credentials
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the endpoint returns 200 on success with a valid JWT token, returns 401 for invalid credentials, and updates the last sign-in timestamp.

tasks.title: Implement Token Validation
tasks.description: Create token validation endpoint and JWT authentication filter.
tasks.details:
- Create TokenValidationRequest and TokenValidationResponse DTOs
- Implement POST /api/auth/verify-token endpoint
- Implement JWT validation logic with Clerk
- Create JwtAuthenticationFilter
- Extract token from Authorization header
- Load user from database
- Populate Spring Security context
- Handle expired/invalid tokens
tasks.testStrategy: Test that valid tokens return user info, invalid tokens return 401, and the JWT filter works on protected endpoints with user context available in controllers.

tasks.title: Implement Refresh Token Endpoint
tasks.description: Create endpoint for refreshing expired JWT tokens.
tasks.details:
- Create RefreshTokenRequest and RefreshTokenResponse DTOs
- Implement POST /api/auth/refresh-token endpoint
- Validate refresh token with Clerk
- Generate new access token
- Return new tokens
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that refresh tokens successfully return new access tokens, invalid refresh tokens return 401, and token rotation works correctly.

tasks.title: Implement Get Current User Endpoint
tasks.description: Create endpoint to retrieve authenticated user profile.
tasks.details:
- Create UserResponse DTO
- Implement GET /api/auth/user endpoint
- Load user from database by JWT claims
- Include organizations and roles
- Include tenant memberships
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the endpoint returns complete user info including organizations and tenants for authenticated users.

tasks.title: Implement Sign-Out Endpoint
tasks.description: Create endpoint for user sign-out and session revocation.
tasks.details:
- Create SignOutRequest DTO
- Implement POST /api/auth/sign-out endpoint
- Revoke session in Clerk
- Update session status in database
- Clear security context
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the session is revoked in Clerk, marked inactive in database, and subsequent requests with the token fail.

tasks.title: Configure Social Login Providers
tasks.description: Set up social login providers in Clerk dashboard.
tasks.details:
- Configure Google OAuth in Clerk
- Configure GitHub OAuth in Clerk
- Configure Facebook OAuth in Clerk
- Configure Apple Sign In in Clerk
- Set redirect URLs
- Configure OAuth scopes for each provider
tasks.testStrategy: Manually test each provider to ensure OAuth flows work correctly and users can sign in with each provider.

tasks.title: Implement Social Sign-In API
tasks.description: Create endpoint for authenticating with social providers.
tasks.details:
- Create SocialSignInRequest and SocialSignInResponse DTOs
- Implement POST /api/auth/sign-in/social endpoint
- Validate OAuth token with Clerk
- Extract user info from Clerk
- Create or update user_profile
- Handle account linking
- Update auth_provider field
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that social sign-in works for all configured providers, account linking functions correctly, and user profiles are properly updated.

tasks.title: Implement Multi-Tenant Service
tasks.description: Create service for handling multi-tenant operations.
tasks.details:
- Create TenantService interface
- Implement TenantServiceImpl
- Implement tenant validation methods
- Implement methods for adding/removing users from tenants
- Implement methods for retrieving user tenants
- Implement tenant switching functionality
- Add tenant isolation to queries
tasks.testStrategy: Test that users can belong to multiple tenants, tenant validation works, tenant switching functions correctly, and data isolation is enforced.

tasks.title: Create Tenant Context Filter
tasks.description: Implement filter to extract and validate tenant context from requests.
tasks.details:
- Create TenantContextFilter
- Extract tenant ID from request (header, param, or JWT)
- Validate tenant ID
- Set tenant in ThreadLocal context
- Clear context after request
- Add filter to security filter chain
tasks.testStrategy: Test that tenant context is available in all requests, invalid tenant IDs return 403, and context is cleaned up after each request.

tasks.title: Implement Organization Sync Service
tasks.description: Create service to synchronize Clerk Organizations with application roles.
tasks.details:
- Create OrganizationSyncService interface
- Implement OrganizationSyncServiceImpl
- Implement syncUserOrganizations method
- Fetch organizations from Clerk
- Map Clerk roles to application roles
- Update user_profile.user_role
- Update clerk_user_tenant records
tasks.testStrategy: Test that organizations are correctly synced from Clerk, roles are properly mapped, and user permissions are updated accordingly.

tasks.title: Configure Role Mapping
tasks.description: Create configuration for mapping Clerk roles to application roles.
tasks.details:
- Create RoleMappingConfiguration class
- Define role mapping rules
- Seed clerk_organization_role table
- Implement getRoleForClerkRole method
- Add configuration properties
- Support the role hierarchy defined in the PRD
tasks.testStrategy: Test that role mappings are correctly configured, database is seeded with appropriate values, and mappings work as expected.

tasks.title: Implement Permission Checking Service
tasks.description: Create service for verifying user permissions and roles.
tasks.details:
- Create PermissionService interface
- Implement PermissionServiceImpl
- Implement permission checking methods
- Implement role verification methods
- Implement resource access methods
- Add tenant-aware permission checks
tasks.testStrategy: Test that permission checking works correctly, role-based access control functions properly, and tenant-aware permissions are enforced.

tasks.title: Implement Webhook Endpoint
tasks.description: Create endpoint for receiving Clerk webhook events.
tasks.details:
- Create WebhookController
- Implement POST /api/webhooks/clerk endpoint
- Verify webhook signature using webhook secret
- Parse webhook payload
- Route to appropriate event handler
- Return appropriate response
- Handle errors gracefully
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the webhook endpoint correctly receives events, validates signatures, and routes events to the appropriate handlers.

tasks.title: Implement Webhook Event Handlers
tasks.description: Create handlers for different types of webhook events.
tasks.details:
- Create WebhookEventHandler interface
- Implement handlers for user events (created, updated, deleted)
- Implement handlers for session events
- Implement handlers for organization membership events
- Add idempotency checking to prevent duplicate processing
- Implement retry logic for failed events
tasks.testStrategy: Test that all event types are handled correctly, user data is synced properly, and idempotency checks prevent duplicate processing.

tasks.title: Add Webhook Audit Logging
tasks.description: Implement audit logging for webhook events.
tasks.details:
- Create WebhookAuditService
- Save events to clerk_webhook_event table
- Log processing results
- Track retry attempts
- Implement cleanup job for old events
tasks.testStrategy: Test that all events are logged, processing status is tracked, and the cleanup job works correctly.

tasks.title: Implement Admin List Users API
tasks.description: Create endpoint for administrators to list and search users.
tasks.details:
- Create AdminController
- Implement GET /api/admin/users endpoint
- Add pagination support
- Add filtering by tenant
- Add sorting options
- Add admin authorization check
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the endpoint returns paginated users, filtering works correctly, and only administrators can access the endpoint.

tasks.title: Implement Admin User Role Management
tasks.description: Create endpoint for administrators to update user roles.
tasks.details:
- Create UpdateRoleRequest DTO
- Implement PUT /api/admin/users/{userId}/role endpoint
- Validate role value
- Update user_profile.user_role
- Update clerk_user_tenant records
- Add admin authorization check
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that user roles are updated successfully, validation works correctly, and only administrators can access the endpoint.

tasks.title: Implement Admin User Status Management
tasks.description: Create endpoint for administrators to suspend or activate users.
tasks.details:
- Create UpdateStatusRequest DTO
- Implement PUT /api/admin/users/{userId}/status endpoint
- Validate status value
- Update user_profile.user_status
- Revoke sessions if suspended
- Add admin authorization check
- Document API in Swagger
tasks.testStrategy: Test that user status is updated successfully, sessions are revoked when suspended, and only administrators can access the endpoint.

tasks.title: Update Security Configuration
tasks.description: Update existing security configuration to use Clerk JWT validation.
tasks.details:
- Configure JWT decoder for Clerk tokens
- Update CORS configuration
- Add rate limiting configuration
- Update security filter chain
- Remove in-memory user details manager
- Configure security for new endpoints
tasks.testStrategy: Test that Clerk JWT validation works correctly, CORS is properly configured, rate limiting works as expected, and the security filter chain functions properly.

tasks.title: Enhance Error Handling
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling for authentication flows.
tasks.details:
- Create custom exception classes
- Extend GlobalExceptionHandler
- Handle Clerk API exceptions
- Handle validation exceptions
- Handle authentication exceptions
- Standardize error responses
- Implement the error codes defined in the PRD
tasks.testStrategy: Test that all exceptions are handled gracefully, error responses are standardized, and Clerk errors are properly mapped to application errors.

tasks.title: Create API Documentation
tasks.description: Generate comprehensive API documentation for all authentication endpoints.
tasks.details:
- Configure Swagger/OpenAPI
- Add API descriptions
- Add request/response examples
- Document authentication flows
- Document error codes
- Generate Postman collection
- Create integration guide
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that Swagger UI is accessible, all endpoints are documented with examples, and the Postman collection works correctly.

tasks.title: Write Integration Tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive integration tests for all authentication flows.
tasks.details:
- Set up test database with TestContainers
- Write authentication flow tests
- Write social login tests
- Write multi-tenant tests
- Write webhook tests
- Write admin API tests
- Write security tests
- Achieve >80% code coverage
tasks.testStrategy: Run all integration tests in CI/CD pipeline and verify that they pass with >80% code coverage.

tasks.title: Perform Security Audit
tasks.description: Conduct security testing to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
tasks.details:
- Run OWASP ZAP scan
- Test for SQL injection vulnerabilities
- Test for XSS vulnerabilities
- Test for CSRF vulnerabilities
- Test authentication bypass scenarios
- Test authorization bypass scenarios
- Test rate limiting effectiveness
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that there are no critical or high vulnerabilities, all findings are documented and fixed, and a security report is generated.

tasks.title: Prepare for Production Deployment
tasks.description: Configure application for production environment.
tasks.details:
- Configure production environment variables
- Set up production Clerk account and credentials
- Configure production Clerk webhook endpoints
- Update CORS for production domains
- Configure SSL/TLS certificates
- Set up monitoring and alerting
- Create deployment scripts
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that the production environment is correctly configured, database is ready, webhooks are configured, and deployment scripts are tested.
